title: nardurus maritimus subsp. aristatus
intro: Nardurus maritimus subsp. aristatus, also known as the Sea Holly, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Sea Holly include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
